<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep changes focused — one logical change per PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] New/changed behaviour has tests where practical
- [ ] User-facing strings are Simplified Chinese (per CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-visible

<!-- CI also runs staticcheck, govulncheck and gosec; they must pass. -->
